scripts.build: npm run build:achievements && vue-tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:achievements: (cd ../achievements && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../frontend/public/static/achievements && cp -r dist ../frontend/public/static/achievements) || echo 'Achievements build failed, using existing static assets if available'
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
